---
title: "Essentials of Utilization-Focused Evaluation Chapter Map"
description: "Reading map for selected Essentials of Utilization-Focused Evaluation notes."
book_id: "essentials-utilization-focused-evaluation"
collection_id: "evaluation-texts"
note_type: "Map"
citation_key: "patton_2012_essentials_utilization_focused_evaluation"
evidence_ids:
  - "chunk:essentials-utilization-focused-evaluation:ch-introduction-overview-and-context:c0007"
  - "chunk:essentials-utilization-focused-evaluation:ch-introduction-overview-and-context:c0027"
  - "chunk:essentials-utilization-focused-evaluation:step10-step-10-negotiate-appropriate-methods-to-generate-credible-findings-that-support:c0005"
source_status: "needs_review"
---
## Source

This map uses selected MCP research-library sections from *Essentials of Utilization-Focused Evaluation* [@patton_2012_essentials_utilization_focused_evaluation].

## Reading Route

1. [Utilization-Focused Evaluation Overview](section-01-utilization-focused-overview.qmd) - pages 27-28; `Introduction, Overview, and Context`
2. [The 17-Step Utilization-Focused Checklist](section-02-seventeen-steps.qmd) - pages 36-37; `Introduction, Overview, and Context`
3. [Negotiating Methods for Intended Use](section-03-methods-for-use.qmd) - pages 288-289; `Step 10: Negotiate Appropriate Methods to Generate Credible Findings That Support Intended Use by Intended Users`

## How to Use This Map

- Start with the first section for the book's framing logic.
- Use the middle section to inspect the main design or method implications.
- Use the final section to check limits, quality standards, or implications for use.

## References
